random.cdisc.data 0.1.0
  • Reference

Time To Event Dataset

ate.Rd

Time To Event Dataset

ate(ADSL, FUN = function(p) {     PARAMCD <- c("OS", "PFS")     PARAM <-
  c("Overall Survival", "Progression Free Survival")     data.frame(USUBJID =
  p$USUBJID, STUDYID = p$STUDYID, PARAMCD = PARAMCD, PARAM = PARAM, AVAL =
  vapply(PARAMCD, function(paramcd) {         switch(paramcd, OS = ifelse(p$ARM
  == "ARM A", rexp(1, 1/100), rexp(1, 1/80)), PFS = ifelse(p$ARM == "ARM A",
  rexp(1, 1/80), rexp(1, 1/65)))     }, numeric(1)), AVALU = "MONTH", CNSR =
  sample(c(T, F), length(PARAMCD), replace = TRUE), stringsAsFactors = FALSE) },
  ..., start_with)

Examples


radam("ATE")
#>     USUBJID STUDYID PARAMCD                     PARAM       AVAL AVALU  CNSR
#> 1      id-1 STUDY A      OS          Overall Survival  31.890744 MONTH FALSE
#> 2      id-1 STUDY A     PFS Progression Free Survival 137.390173 MONTH  TRUE
#> 3     id-10 STUDY A      OS          Overall Survival 356.902912 MONTH  TRUE
#> 4     id-10 STUDY A     PFS Progression Free Survival  10.199875 MONTH  TRUE
#> 5    id-100 STUDY A      OS          Overall Survival  66.071990 MONTH FALSE
#> 6    id-100 STUDY A     PFS Progression Free Survival  93.635000 MONTH  TRUE
#> 7     id-11 STUDY A      OS          Overall Survival  18.342575 MONTH  TRUE
#> 8     id-11 STUDY A     PFS Progression Free Survival 136.148499 MONTH FALSE
#> 9     id-12 STUDY A      OS          Overall Survival  57.077193 MONTH  TRUE
#> 10    id-12 STUDY A     PFS Progression Free Survival  36.043052 MONTH FALSE

#>                                                     EVNTDESC
#> 1                                        Disease Progression
#> 2                                              Randomization
#> 3                                                      Alive
#> 4                                              Randomization
#> 5                                             First Response
#> 6                                      Last tumor assessment
#> 7                                              Randomization
#> 8                                                      Death
#> 9                                                      Alive
#> 10                                       Disease Progression
#> 11                                            First Response
#> 12                                       Disease Progression
